AElf.Deploy.Cli 0.0.2+766bd76e5d105ee8e0af29ff601f20493a4396e1
Copyright (C) 2026 AElf.Deploy.Cli

  -e, --endpoint          (Default: 127.0.0.1:8000) Endpoint of local aelf node.

  -a, --address           Account address to sign transactions.

  -p, --password          Password of key store file.

  -u, --update            (Default: false) Is update contract.

  -c, --contract          Required. The path of the contract's DLL.

  -i, --approval          (Default: false) Is approval needed.

  -s, --salt              (Default: ) Salt to calculate contract address. It
                          will be the hex decimal of contract code hash if not
                          provided.

  -o, --isproxyaddress    (Default: false) Is proxy address.

  -n, --signer            The signer.

  -t, --updateaddress     The contract address to update.

  -k, --privatekey        Private key

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.
